Glove Holder.unit: Three size options (to hold 2, 3 or 4 glove boxes)
Glove Holder.description: Three size options to hold 2, 3 or 4 glove boxes. 4" depth can accommodate virtually any size glove box on the market. Steel construction with baked-on white finish. Includes wall mounting hardware.
Glove Holder.specifications: Depth: 4"; Material: Steel with baked-on white finish; Includes: wall mounting hardware; Capacity: Options to hold 2, 3 or 4 glove boxes
Glove Holder.alternative products: Safco Nitrilex Surpass nitrile gloves, Safco Safewrap syringe sleeves, Safco retainer boxes, Safco SafeWrap tray sleeves, Safco scalers

Latex gloves.specifications: Micro-textured finish, Beaded cuff, Chlorinated, Ambidextrous, 50μg or less of latex protein, Natural color, 100 gloves per box, Order 10 boxes to purchase a case

Nitrile gloves.product name: Aquasoft Powder Free Nitrile Dental Exam Gloves
Nitrile gloves.description: Powder-free nitrile exam gloves. Ultra-thin with a silky, snug fit. Easy to don.
